title: 9分达人听力7 Test 6 Listening
source: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

groups.title: Enquiry about Childcare Centre
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: About the Fees For short-day caring: • 1 $1$ for children under 2 years old. • Meals aren't included. • There are $2$ hours of free caring (one week). About the Centre • The centre has its own playground and offers outdoor $3$. • Teachers in the centre have experience in $4$ teaching. • Like other centres, it has a weekly $5$. • The earliest month child can join is $6$. About the Staff • For some activities, the staff need to bring $7$, sunglasses and sun cream. • They also should bring a $8$ for each child. • All staff have to provide a medical $9$ from the doctor. Contact Details • Address: NO.75, $10$ Avenue, Walkley • Phone number: 4789 6354

questions.title: 1 $【   】 for children under 2 years old.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 short-day caring；提示词为 $、under 2 years old，此处应填数字，且符合题干 under 2 years old 这个要求。
题目解析：本题需通过前文信息定位，考生可先听到 short-day (caring)，其后听到 children over the age of two 的费用为 30，不符合题干要求。随后听到 younger than two，是题干 under 2 years old 的同义替换，接着听到数字 37.50，即为该题答案。本题先是要求考生根据题干限定排除干扰信息，然后考查考生是否熟悉带有小数的价格单位的读法。

questions.title: There are 【   】 hours of free caring (one week).
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 meals；提示词为 hours、free caring、one week，此处应填数字。
题目解析：前文信息 meals 讨论完后，听到 free care 这一提示信息，随后听到数字 20 hours 以及 weekly，确定 20 为该题答案。注意之后出现的干扰信息 10 hours，根据原文的 used to，可判断其为过去的时长，不符合题干要求。

questions.title: The centre has its own playground and offers outdoor 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 playground；提示词为 outdoor，此处应填名词或名词短语。
题目解析：本题跟上一题间隔较长，但定位词是原词出现的，考生耐心听取就能定位到。此后可以听到符合题干要求的名词 programmes，其后的 in the open air 是题干 outdoor 的同义替换，也可进一步确定答案。注意美式拼写 programs 也是正确的。

questions.title: Teachers in the centre have experience in 【   】 teaching.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 teachers、experience；提示词为 in、teaching，此处应填名词或形容词来搭配 teaching。
题目解析：定位词 teachers 由男士提出，随后女士提到 experience，可准确定位，接着可听到 primary school 搭配 education 出现，其中 education 是题干 teaching 的同义替换，可确定 primary school 为正确答案。

questions.title: Like other centres, it has a weekly 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 other centres、weekly；提示词为 like、weekly，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 other centres 通过 other parents、their caring centres 体现出来，在此期间可听到符合题干要求的 report 出现，先记录下来，随后出现 every weekend、week 等信息，符合题干 weekly 的要求，可确定答案。

questions.title: The earliest month child can join is 【   】.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 earliest、is，此处应填月份，且符合题干 earliest 的限定要求。
题目解析：上一题结束后，考生可根据本题答案要求直接听取月份。原文提到“... you can't join until the beginning of September ...”，其中 not ... until 意为“直到……才”，可确定 September 为正确答案。注意随后出现的干扰信息 August，原文说的是“其中一个孩子将在 8 月底结束托管”。

questions.title: For some activities, the staff need to bring 【   】, sunglasses and sun cream.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 staff、activities；提示词为 bring、sunglasses、sun cream，此处应填物品类的名词或名词短语，且与 sunglasses、sun cream 存在并列关系。
题目解析：定位词 staff 和 activities 原词重现，接着可听到符合题干搭配要求的 aprons 一词，可先记录下来，随后听到其他提示信息 sunglasses 和 sun cream，可确定答案。

questions.title: They also should bring a 【   】 for each child.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 bring、a、each child，此处应填单数名词或名词短语，表示携带的物品。
题目解析：定位信息不明显，考生可将对话角色的转换作为内容的推进信号。女士介绍员工会准备的物品后，男士回道“It's great that you can consider that.”，表明上一题结束。接着女士提到“You must provide something ...”，提示本题已开始，准备抓听符合该题搭配的信息，随后听到 family photo，符合题干要求，可先记录下来，接着 take、every child 先后出现，对应题干提示信息，可确定 family photo 为正确答案。

questions.title: All staff have to provide a medical 【   】 from the doctor.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 all staff、doctor；提示词为 medical，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题可以通过提问辅助定位。上一题结束后，男士问道“... are there any other requirements for your staff?”随后女士答道：“... each applicant must provide a health certificate from the doctor.”，其中 each applicant 替换了题干 all staff，health 替换了 medical，doctor 原词重现，可确定 certificate 为正确答案。该题根据常识还是比较好理解的，入职托儿所通常都需要提供有医生证明的健康证。

questions.title: Address: NO.75, 【   】 Avenue, Walkley
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Address、NO.75；提示词为 Address、Avenue，此处应填街道名称。
题目解析：本题无干扰信息，难度不大。定位词原词重现，考生根据原文报出的字母拼写即可。注意 double L 连读的发音，建议先听取 Calliope 的完整发音。

transcript.en: Director: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Director: Welcome to the Early Learning Childcare Centre.
transcript.cn: 欢迎来到早期学习儿童保育中心。

transcript.en: Director: How can I help you?
transcript.cn: 有什么可以帮您的吗？

transcript.en: Man: Good morning.
transcript.cn: 早上好。

transcript.en: Man: I came across the advertisement for your childcare centre last week, and I'm calling to get some details.
transcript.cn: 我上周偶然看到了你们儿童保育中心的广告，打电话来是想了解一些详情。

transcript.en: Man: I'm thinking of enrolling my daughter.
transcript.cn: 我正考虑让女儿报名。

transcript.en: Director: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Director: What do you want to know, sir?
transcript.cn: 先生，您想了解什么？

transcript.en: Man: Well, I've learnt from the brochure that there are different types of caring, and I'm interested in the short-day one.
transcript.cn: 嗯，我从宣传册上了解到你们有不同类型的托管服务，我对短日托管感兴趣。

transcript.en: Man: How much is the cost?
transcript.cn: 费用是多少？

transcript.en: Director: Well, it depends on the age of your child.
transcript.cn: 这个要看您孩子的年龄。

transcript.en: Director: For children over the age of two, we charge 30 dollars a day, and for those younger than two, you have to pay 37.50 dollars.
transcript.cn: 两岁以上的儿童每天收费30美元，两岁以下则需支付37.50美元。

transcript.en: Man: Does it include meals?
transcript.cn: 费用包括餐食吗？

transcript.en: Director: Well, I'm afraid not.
transcript.cn: 恐怕不包括。

transcript.en: Director: You have to pay extra for them.
transcript.cn: 餐食需要另外付费。

transcript.en: Director: But we offer you free care for 20 hours weekly.
transcript.cn: 不过，我们每周提供20小时的免费托管。

transcript.en: Director: It used to be 10 hours, but this month, we extended the length of time as a special offer for our clients.
transcript.cn: 以前是10小时，但本月我们为客户推出特别优惠，延长了免费托管时间。

transcript.en: Man: Oh, that will be of great help.
transcript.cn: 哦，那可太有帮助了。

transcript.en: Man: OK, that's about the fee.
transcript.cn: 好的，费用方面就这些。

transcript.en: Man: Then may I know more about your centre, something about the children's activities, the staff etc.?
transcript.cn: 那我可以再了解一下你们中心吗，比如孩子们的活动、工作人员之类的？

transcript.en: Director: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Director: We offer a diversity of indoor activities, which cater for children of different ages, for example, paintings with watercolours, singing, dancing, games etc.
transcript.cn: 我们提供丰富多样的室内活动，以满足不同年龄儿童的需求，例如水彩画、唱歌、跳舞和游戏等。

transcript.en: Director: Moreover, when the weather is good, we always take children to our playground and organize different programmes in the open air.
transcript.cn: 此外，天气好的时候，我们总会带孩子们去游乐场，组织各种户外活动。

transcript.en: Man: That's great!
transcript.cn: 太好了！

transcript.en: Man: Outdoor activities are essential for children.
transcript.cn: 户外活动对孩子来说非常重要。

transcript.en: Man: What about the teachers?
transcript.cn: 老师们怎么样？

transcript.en: Man: Are they experienced?
transcript.cn: 他们有经验吗？

transcript.en: Director: Of course!
transcript.cn: 当然！

transcript.en: Director: All teachers in our centre have relevant working experience of at least three years and specialize in primary school education.
transcript.cn: 我们中心的所有老师都至少有三年相关工作经验，并且专长是小学教育。

transcript.en: Man: Great!
transcript.cn: 太好了！

transcript.en: Man: Then they must be professional in dealing with children.
transcript.cn: 那他们在照顾孩子方面一定很专业。

transcript.en: Man: Another thing is, I've heard from other parents that they can receive a report from their caring centres every weekend about how their children perform during that week, and I wonder, is there anything like that in your centre?
transcript.cn: 还有一件事，我听其他家长说，他们每个周末都会收到托管中心出具的报告，介绍孩子当周的表现。我想知道，你们中心也有这样的报告吗？

transcript.en: Director: Yes, we provide that too.
transcript.cn: 有的，我们也提供。

transcript.en: Man: Great!
transcript.cn: 太好了！

transcript.en: Man: Then I want to enrol my daughter as soon as possible.
transcript.cn: 那我想尽快给女儿报名。

transcript.en: Director: Well, I'm afraid we have no vacancy at the moment, and you can't join until the beginning of September because one child will finish caring at the end of August.
transcript.cn: 恐怕我们目前没有空位，您要到9月初才能入托，因为有一个孩子会在8月底结束托管。

transcript.en: Man: I see.
transcript.cn: 我明白了。

transcript.en: Director: Then I will talk about our staff.
transcript.cn: 接下来我介绍一下我们的工作人员。

transcript.en: Director: All of our centre's members are well trained so that they will take care of your children in every aspect.
transcript.cn: 我们中心的所有工作人员都训练有素，能够全方位照顾您的孩子。

transcript.en: Director: For example, when doing activities with special needs, our staff will prepare all the necessities for children, like aprons in the painting class, sunglasses and sun cream when playing outside in a sunny day.
transcript.cn: 例如，开展有特殊用品需求的活动时，我们的工作人员会为孩子准备好所有必需品，比如绘画课用的围裙，以及晴天在户外玩耍时需要的太阳镜和防晒霜。

transcript.en: Man: It's great that you can consider that.
transcript.cn: 你们能考虑到这些，真是太好了。

transcript.en: Man: I thought we had to prepare for these by ourselves.
transcript.cn: 我原以为这些得由我们自己准备。

transcript.en: Director: You must provide something - a family photo.
transcript.cn: 有一样东西必须由您提供，那就是一张全家福。

transcript.en: Director: Many children may miss their parents, especially during the first week, so our staff will take photos of every child in case they need them.
transcript.cn: 很多孩子可能会想念父母，尤其是在第一周，所以我们的工作人员会给每个孩子拍照，以备他们需要时使用。

transcript.en: Man: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Man: Apart from the professional knowledge of caring, are there any other requirements for your staff?
transcript.cn: 除了专业的保育知识，你们对工作人员还有其他要求吗？

transcript.en: Director: Well, actually, when we do the recruitment, the priority we consider is the general health of the staff, so each applicant must provide a health certificate from the doctor.
transcript.cn: 其实，我们招聘时优先考虑的是工作人员的整体健康状况，因此每位申请人都必须提供医生开具的健康证明。

transcript.en: Man: Yes, I agree it's essential.
transcript.cn: 是的，我也认为这非常重要。

transcript.en: Man: I've learned about your centre and am pretty interested.
transcript.cn: 我已经了解了你们中心，确实很感兴趣。

transcript.en: Man: But I still have to discuss it with my wife.
transcript.cn: 不过，我还得和妻子商量一下。

transcript.en: Director: Of course.
transcript.cn: 当然可以。

transcript.en: Director: Then I'll give you the contact detail of our centre, and if you want to register, you can call us or even have a visit if you like.
transcript.cn: 那我把我们中心的联系方式给您。如果您想报名，可以给我们打电话，也可以过来参观。

transcript.en: Man: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Man: What's your address?
transcript.cn: 你们的地址是什么？

transcript.en: Director: It's NO.75, Calliope Avenue, that's C-A-double L-I-O-P-E, Walkley.
transcript.cn: 地址是沃克利卡利奥佩大道75号，卡利奥佩拼作C-A-L-L-I-O-P-E。

transcript.en: Man: OK, NO.75, Calliope Avenue.
transcript.cn: 好的，卡利奥佩大道75号。

transcript.en: Director: And the telephone number is 4789 6354.
Man: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Man: That's everything I want to know.
transcript.cn: 我想了解的就是这些。

transcript.en: Man: Thank you very much.
transcript.cn: 非常感谢。

transcript.en: Director: You are welcome!
transcript.cn: 不客气！

transcript.en: Director: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

transcript.en: Man: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

groups.title: Coconut Beach Resort
groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: Who are suitable for Coconut Beach Resort?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Coconut Beach Resort；提示词为 who、suitable。
题目解析：本题作为开篇第一题，定位难度不大。原文通过“First of all, who is the target group?”引出该题。随后听到 not suitable for backpackers，否定了 A 选项。之后听到“... this resort is the best place to ...”，符合题干的 suitable 这一信息，接着听到“... spend time with your beloved one.”，对应 B 选项 couples，因此 B 选项为正确答案。原文之后还提到“... it isn't an ideal destination for families with several children ...”，说明 C 选项也被否定。

questions.title: Which type of room does Anna prefer?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 room；提示词为 prefer。
题目解析：定位词在原文通过 accommodation 来体现，原文先提到 room with a spa bath 是最划算的（cost-effective），但并未表明是否喜欢，因此 A 选项可排除。接着提到 room with a private pool 是最喜欢的（my favourite），对应题干的 prefer，因此 C 选项为正确答案。原文虽提到 room with a private beach，但说的是希望以后能体验，不符合题干要求，因此 B 选项也可排除。

questions.title: Which facility was recently built?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 facility；提示词为 recently、built。
题目解析：定位词以复数的形式出现，定位难度不大。原文先提到 B 选项 golf shop，但并未提及 recently built 的信息，因此可先排除 B 选项。接着出现 A 选项 picnic area，但对应的信息是 extended recently，与题干的 built 相矛盾，因此 A 选项也可排除。最后原文提到 a horse ranch was added to the resort，符合题干要求，因此 C 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: What impressed Anna most?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 impressed、most。
题目解析：定位信息不明显，上一题结束后，考生便可开始听取该题信息。原文先后提及 waterfall 和 town，但都对应不上题干的 impressed ... most。接着出现 rainforest，原文提到“It was my first time seeing a rainforest, and I was struck by ...”，其中 be struck by 意为“被……打动”，此处表示给女士留下了深刻的印象，对应题干的 impressed ... most，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Why do the visitors like the rainforest exploration?

options.title: C
options.content: It is the most interesting activity.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 rainforest exploration；提示词为 why、visitors、like。
题目解析：定位词在原文通过 explore the rainforest 来体现，原文提到“It is an exciting activity for both young and old, so all the people who have been there loved it.”，其中 both young and old 对应 A 选项的 all ages；who have been there 替换了题干的 visitors；love 替换了 like，信息都能对应上，因此 A 选项为正确答案。原文虽然说这个活动 exciting，但并未提及其 most interesting，因此 C 选项可排除。原文虽提到 a guide will lead you，但并未提及 excellent for guiding，因此 B 选项也可排除。B、C 选项都属于过度推断，这是干扰项的典型特点。

questions.title: The Sound of the Birds is only opened on
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Sound of the Birds；提示词为 is、only、open。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“It used to be open at weekends ...”，其中 used to 表示“曾经”，与题干的时态相矛盾，因此 C 选项可排除。随后原文提到“... it has changed the schedule and put it on the last two days of the weekdays.”，其中 the last two days of the weekdays 对应 B 选项的信息，因此 B 选项为正确答案。A 选项在原文未提及。

groups.question_title: Which TWO facilities does the resort centre provide?
groups.desc:
Questions 17 and 18
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 facilities、resort centre；提示词为 does、provide。
题目解析：本题定位不难，定位词 facilities 和 resort centre 都原词重现。原文先提到 transfer service, “A bus will pick you up ... there is no extra charge.”，对应 B 选项 free bus transfer，因此 B 选项为第一个正确答案，并且可判断 D 选项 car transfer 错误。接着原文提到 café，但原文说的开放时间为 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.，不符合 A 选项的 24-hour，因此 A 选项可排除。随后出现“If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office ...”，可判断 E 选项为第二个正确答案。最后原文提到 the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment，可判断 C 选项不符合题干要求。

听前预测：定位词为 facilities、resort centre；提示词为 does、provide。
题目解析：本题定位不难，定位词 facilities 和 resort centre 都原词重现。原文先提到 transfer service, “A bus will pick you up ... there is no extra charge.”，对应 B 选项 free bus transfer，因此 B 选项为第一个正确答案，并且可判断 D 选项 car transfer 错误。接着原文提到 café，但原文说的开放时间为 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.，不符合 A 选项的 24-hour，因此 A 选项可排除。随后出现“If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office ...”，可判断 E 选项为第二个正确答案。最后原文提到 the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment，可判断 C 选项不符合题干要求。

groups.question_title: In the tour of visiting educational aboriginal tribe, visitors can
groups.desc:
Questions 19 and 20
Choose TWO letters, A-E.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 aboriginal tribe；提示词为 visitors。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.”，说明土著历史或土著传统，包括传统舞蹈和毛毯编织，游客可能是在学校学到的，而并非亲自体验的，因此 A、B、D 三个选项都不符合题干要求，均可排除。接着原文提到“But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.”，其中 talking to well-known painters 对应 C 选项 meet the artists，因此 C 选项为其中一个正确答案。之后 what's more 引出另一个答案句“... a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment ...”，其中 herbalist 意为“草药医生”，herbal treatment 意为“草药治疗”，对应 E 选项的 medicines，因此 E 选项为另一个正确答案。

听前预测：定位词为 aboriginal tribe；提示词为 visitors。
题目解析：定位词原词重现。原文先提到“Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.”，说明土著历史或土著传统，包括传统舞蹈和毛毯编织，游客可能是在学校学到的，而并非亲自体验的，因此 A、B、D 三个选项都不符合题干要求，均可排除。接着原文提到“But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.”，其中 talking to well-known painters 对应 C 选项 meet the artists，因此 C 选项为其中一个正确答案。之后 what's more 引出另一个答案句“... a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment ...”，其中 herbalist 意为“草药医生”，herbal treatment 意为“草药治疗”，对应 E 选项的 medicines，因此 E 选项为另一个正确答案。

transcript.en: Welcome to our radio program 'Travel with Me in Australia'.
transcript.cn: 欢迎收听我们的广播节目《与我畅游澳大利亚》。

transcript.en: I'm Anna, the presenter of the radio show.
transcript.cn: 我是这档广播节目的主持人安娜。

transcript.en: In today's session, I will introduce a fantastic place to you - the Coconut Beach Resort, which was newly built and opened to the public several months ago.
transcript.cn: 在今天的节目中，我要向大家介绍一个很棒的地方——椰子海滩度假村。它是新建的，几个月前才对外开放。

transcript.en: I visited the resort last week and had a wonderful time there.
transcript.cn: 我上周去过这家度假村，在那里度过了一段美好时光。

transcript.en: Now I will give some details.
transcript.cn: 现在我来介绍一些详细信息。

transcript.en: First of all, who is the target group?
transcript.cn: 首先，它的目标客群是谁呢？

transcript.en: As it is a beach resort, it's not suitable for backpackers, of course.
transcript.cn: 当然，因为它是一家海滩度假村，所以并不适合背包客。

transcript.en: With little houses alongside the beach, this resort is the best place to spend time with your beloved one.
transcript.cn: 这家度假村沿海滩建有一座座小屋，是与爱人共度时光的最佳去处。

transcript.en: I know several newlyweds booked cabins there to spend their honeymoon.
transcript.cn: 我知道有几对新婚夫妇预订了那里的小屋度蜜月。

transcript.en: However, it isn't an ideal destination for families with several children because it may be beyond the budget.
transcript.cn: 不过，对于有好几个孩子的家庭来说，这里并不是理想的目的地，因为费用可能会超出预算。

transcript.en: About the accommodation, you can choose from different types of rooms, and the price differs a lot.
transcript.cn: 住宿方面，有多种房型可供选择，价格差异很大。

transcript.en: Take the bathing facilities, for example; I booked a room with a spa bath for the first two days, which is the most cost-effective one.
transcript.cn: 以洗浴设施为例，头两天我订了一间带水疗浴缸的客房，这是性价比最高的房型。

transcript.en: But for the three days left, I changed the room and lived in the one with a private pool.
transcript.cn: 但剩下的三天里，我换了房间，住进了带私人泳池的房型。

transcript.en: It was my favourite; I have to say.
transcript.cn: 不得不说，那是我最喜欢的房型。

transcript.en: Every night I could relax in the pool, which is so personal and secluded.
transcript.cn: 每天晚上我都可以在泳池里放松，那里非常私密而幽静。

transcript.en: And the third option is a room with a private beach, which I want to experience next time.
transcript.cn: 第三种选择是带私人海滩的客房，我下次想体验一下。

transcript.en: The resort has various facilities catering to the needs of different visitors.
transcript.cn: 度假村设有各种设施，可以满足不同游客的需求。

transcript.en: There is a golf course, and if you want to play, you can either hire the equipment on the course or buy it in the golf shop.
transcript.cn: 那里有一座高尔夫球场。如果想打球，你既可以在球场租用装备，也可以在高尔夫用品商店购买。

transcript.en: If you're going to bring some snacks and drinks and relax in the open air, you can go to the picnic area, which was extended recently.
transcript.cn: 如果你想带些零食和饮料到户外放松，可以去最近扩建过的野餐区。

transcript.en: The good news is that a horse ranch was added to the resort, so you can try horse riding if interested.
transcript.cn: 好消息是，度假村新增了一座马场，所以感兴趣的话可以尝试骑马。

transcript.en: You can also visit a range of attractions, like the farm, waterfall etc.
transcript.cn: 你还可以游览农场、瀑布等一系列景点。

transcript.en: I went to the town on the first day to enjoy the local food and talk with the local people.
transcript.cn: 第一天我去了镇上，品尝当地美食，还和当地人聊了天。

transcript.en: Then, the next day, I joined a tour group to the rainforest.
transcript.cn: 第二天，我跟随旅行团去了雨林。

transcript.en: It was my first time seeing a rainforest, and I was struck by the thick vegetation and diverse species, so I recommend it to you.
transcript.cn: 那是我第一次见到雨林，茂密的植被和丰富的物种令我惊叹不已，所以我推荐大家去看看。

transcript.en: If you like, you can even explore the rainforest.
transcript.cn: 如果愿意，你甚至可以深入探索雨林。

transcript.en: Walking among the densely covered forest, you can find different species of plants and animals.
transcript.cn: 行走在植被茂密的森林中，你可以发现各种不同的动植物。

transcript.en: It is an exciting activity for both young and old, so all the people who have been there loved it.
transcript.cn: 无论老少，这都是一项令人兴奋的活动，所以去过的人都很喜欢。

transcript.en: Don't worry; you won't get lost, as a guide will lead you throughout the exploration.
transcript.cn: 不用担心，你不会迷路，因为整个探索过程中都会有向导带领。

transcript.en: The most popular attraction is called the Sound of the Birds.
transcript.cn: 最受欢迎的景点叫作“鸟鸣之声”。

transcript.en: It used to be open at weekends, but it was always crowded with people.
transcript.cn: 它过去在周末开放，但总是人满为患。

transcript.en: As a result, it has changed the schedule and put it on the last two days of the weekdays.
transcript.cn: 因此，它调整了开放安排，改到工作日的最后两天开放。

transcript.en: I think it will give visitors a better experience.
transcript.cn: 我认为这会给游客带来更好的体验。

transcript.en: Besides the recreational facilities, I'd also like to introduce you to some other facilities in the resort centre that may be useful.
transcript.cn: 除了娱乐设施，我还想介绍一下度假村中心内其他一些可能有用的设施。

transcript.en: First, it offers a transfer service.
transcript.cn: 首先，这里提供接送服务。

transcript.en: You don't have to rent a car or take a taxi when you arrive at the airport.
transcript.cn: 抵达机场后，你不必租车或乘坐出租车。

transcript.en: A bus will pick you up and take you directly to the resort.
transcript.cn: 会有大巴来接你，直接把你送到度假村。

transcript.en: It leaves every 24 minutes, and there is no extra charge.
transcript.cn: 大巴每24分钟一班，而且不另行收费。

transcript.en: For coffee lovers, there is a café in the centre, and it opens from 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.
transcript.cn: 对于咖啡爱好者，中心里有一家咖啡馆，营业时间为上午8点至晚上11点。

transcript.en: If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office, which is located next to the café.
transcript.cn: 如果你想预订景点的导览游，可以前往咖啡馆旁边的旅游预订处。

transcript.en: However, the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment, so if you want to buy some souvenirs for your families or friends, maybe you have to go to the town.
transcript.cn: 不过，旅游纪念品商店正在翻修，目前没有营业。因此，如果你想给家人或朋友买些纪念品，可能得去镇上。

transcript.en: The last thing I want to mention is there is an aboriginal tribe near the resort, and if you are interested, there is a visit every Wednesday.
transcript.cn: 最后我想提的是，度假村附近有一个原住民部落。如果感兴趣，每周三都有参观活动。

transcript.en: Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.
transcript.cn: 也许有些人在学校学过原住民的历史或传统，比如传统舞蹈和编织毯子。

transcript.en: But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.
transcript.cn: 但这一次，你可以亲自体验，欣赏原住民岩画，甚至与知名画家交谈。

transcript.en: What's more, a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment, which is commonly used in the aboriginal tribe.
transcript.cn: 此外，当地的一位草药师还会为你介绍原住民部落中常用的草药疗法。

transcript.en: It is an educational visit and I'm sure you will learn much about the Aboriginal tribe.
transcript.cn: 这是一次很有教育意义的参观，我相信你会了解到很多有关原住民部落的知识。

transcript.en: OK, that's all I want to introduce today.
transcript.cn: 好了，今天我要介绍的就是这些。

transcript.en: If you want to know more exciting holiday resorts in Australia, please wait for our program next week.
transcript.cn: 如果你想了解澳大利亚更多令人心动的度假胜地，请期待我们下周的节目。

transcript.en: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

groups.title: Archaeology Course
groups.desc:
Questions 21-30
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
groups.collect: Can be combined with any other subjects except $21$ Has three $22$ modules in the first semester Module 1 Title: $23$ Lecturer: Dr Morris Learning method: Lectures and practical sessions Content: Based on processes • recording • $24$ • interpretation • display Assessment: By $25$ Module 2 Title: $26$ Lecturer: Prof. Elliot Content: $27$ and development of built environments Assessment: By $28$ examination Module 3 Title: Method and Science Lecturer: Dr Thompson Content: Standard techniques in fieldwork and analysis Learning method: 50% lab work, 50% $29$ Site survey at the end of the module (the $30$ is to be announced later)

questions.title: Can be combined with any other subjects except 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 other subjects；提示词为 subjects、except，此处应填学科名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词 other subjects 原词重现，男生提问中先出现学科词汇 anthropology，可先记录下来，但未听到题干信息 except，故不能判断其是否为正确答案。之后从女士的回答中听到相关信息 apart from，对应题干的 except，其后接的学科词汇 classical history 即为正确答案。

questions.title: Has three 【   】 modules in the first semester
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 three、first semester；提示词为 modules、first semester，此处应填形容词或名词，修饰 modules。
题目解析：本题定位不难，题干的 modules、first semester、three 皆原词重现，随后出现的 compulsory 符合题干词性要求，记录下来即可。注意后面出现的 optional 一词，原文说的是下学期才会提供。

questions.title: Title: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 module 1；提示词为 title，此处应填名词或名词短语，表示课程名称。
题目解析：通过 first module 可以定位到该题，接着听到 is called，说明表示名称的词将要出现，可以准备抓取，Object Matters 即为正确答案。

听前预测：定位词、提示词为 recording，此处应填名词或名词短语。
题目解析：本题定位需利用好题干已知信息。上一题结束后，考生可听到题干的 Dr Morris、lectures、practical sessions、processes 皆原词重现，接着听到 recording，表明该题答案即将出现，准备抓取，之后便可听到答案词 classification，记录下来即可。此题主要难点在于 classification 与 recording 前后间隔较短，考生需利用前文已知信息提前做好准备。

questions.title: Assessment: By 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 assessment；提示词为 by，此处应填名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词通过 assessed 体现出来，替换难度不大。定位到该题后，男生先提到 exam，可先记录下来，接着女士对此进行了否定，故 exam 为干扰信息，可排除。随后女士提到“It's all based on coursework ...”，可确定 coursework 为正确答案。

questions.title: Title: 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 module 2；提示词为 title，此处应填名词或名词短语，表示课程名称。
题目解析：本题难度不大。题干的 second module、title 先后原词重现，定位到该题，接着便可听到名词短语 Towns and Cities，记录下来即可。

questions.title: 【   】 and development of built environments
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Prof. Elliot；提示词为 and、development、built environments，此处应填名词或名词短语，且与 development 存在并列关系。
题目解析：本题需通过前文信息提前定位，在听到 Professor Elliot 后，即可准备抓取符合题干要求的词。随后听到 origins 一词，符合要求，可以先记录下来，接着听到“... built environments and how they developed.”，与题干信息相对应，可确定 origins 为正确答案。

questions.title: Assessment: By 【   】 examination
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 assessment；提示词为 by、examination，此处应填形容词或名词。
题目解析：本题定位不难，assessed 和 examination 先后出现，随后抓取到符合题干要求的答案词为 oral。注意该题需要通过否定词组 instead of 排除 written 这个干扰信息。

questions.title: Learning method: 50% lab work, 50% 【   】
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 learning method、lab work、50%；提示词为 50%，此处应填名词或名词短语。
题目解析：原文先后出现 learning method 和 laboratory work，可以定位到该题，随后听到 half lab work and half seminars，其中 half 替换了题干 50% 这个信息，难度不大，可确定 seminars 为正确答案。

questions.title: Site survey at the end of the module (the 【   】 is to be announced later)
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 site survey、end of the module；提示词为 the、is、announced later，此处应填单数名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词 end of the module 和 site survey 先后原词重现，可以定位到该题。随后女士提到“I can't tell you the location yet.”，其中 location 符合题干要求，可以先记录下来。之后女士提到“That would be announced later”，与题干信息相符，可确定 location 为正确答案。

transcript.en: Russ: Erm ... hello Professor, I'm Russ.
transcript.cn: 嗯……教授，您好，我是拉斯。

transcript.en: Russ: I spoke to you on the phone last week.
transcript.cn: 我上周和您通过电话。

transcript.en: Tutor: Ah, yes, come in and have a seat.
transcript.cn: 啊，是的，请进，坐吧。

transcript.en: Tutor: You want to talk to me about the archaeology course, right?
transcript.cn: 你是想和我谈谈考古学课程，对吧？

transcript.en: Russ: Yes, I've read the handbook, but I still have some questions and want to know more details before deciding whether to do it.
transcript.cn: 是的，我读过课程手册了，但还有一些问题。在决定是否选修之前，我想了解更多细节。

transcript.en: Tutor: Right.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Tutor: So, what would you like to know?
transcript.cn: 那么，你想了解什么？

transcript.en: Russ: Well, first of all, when I choose the archaeology course, can I integrate it with other subjects?
transcript.cn: 首先，如果我选择考古学课程，可以把它和其他学科结合起来学习吗？

transcript.en: Russ: For example, one in anthropology?
transcript.cn: 比如人类学课程？

transcript.en: Tutor: Yes, it can be combined with any other subjects apart from classical history.
transcript.cn: 可以。除了古典史之外，它可以与任何其他学科组合。

transcript.en: Tutor: That's because there is some overlap in the lecture times for those two courses.
transcript.cn: 这是因为这两门课程的上课时间有些重叠。

transcript.en: Tutor: We weren't able to coordinate them.
transcript.cn: 我们没能把它们协调开。

transcript.en: Russ: That's OK.
transcript.cn: 没关系。

transcript.en: Russ: Then about the modules, could you tell me the details?
transcript.cn: 那么关于课程模块，您能告诉我一些详细信息吗？

transcript.en: Tutor: In the first semester, there are three modules, all of which are compulsory.
transcript.cn: 第一学期有三个模块，而且全都是必修的。

transcript.en: Russ: What about optional modules?
transcript.cn: 那选修模块呢？

transcript.en: Tutor: Well, we don't offer optional modules until next semester.
transcript.cn: 我们要到下学期才会开设选修模块。

transcript.en: Russ: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Tutor: The first module is called Object Matters, and Dr Morris teaches it.
transcript.cn: 第一个模块叫“物件研究”，由莫里斯博士授课。

transcript.en: Tutor: This module is mainly about what can be learnt from specific artifacts such as pottery and stone tools.
transcript.cn: 这个模块主要研究能从陶器、石器等具体文物中了解到什么。

transcript.en: Russ: That's something I've never heard about.
transcript.cn: 这个内容我以前从没听说过。

transcript.en: Russ: I'm interested.
transcript.cn: 我很感兴趣。

transcript.en: Russ: How is the module presented?
transcript.cn: 这个模块采用什么授课形式？

transcript.en: Russ: I mean, is it all lectures?
transcript.cn: 我是说，全部都是讲座吗？

transcript.en: Tutor: Well, you mean the learning method.
transcript.cn: 你指的是学习方式吧。

transcript.en: Tutor: In this case, its lectures are combined with practical sessions, so it's a mixture.
transcript.cn: 这个模块把讲座与实践课结合起来，所以采用的是混合形式。

transcript.en: Russ: What about the content of the module?
transcript.cn: 这个模块的内容呢？

transcript.en: Russ: I suppose we will be looking at different kinds of archaeological remains and how to date them, that kind of thing.
transcript.cn: 我想我们会研究不同种类的考古遗存，以及如何确定它们的年代，诸如此类的内容。

transcript.en: Tutor: To some extent, yes.
transcript.cn: 在某种程度上，是的。

transcript.en: Tutor: But the module is based on processes.
transcript.cn: 不过，这个模块以研究流程为基础。

transcript.en: Tutor: And it covers four aspects in detail: first of all, recording material, and then classification, then the interpretation of the data, that's how archaeologists conclude their findings, and finally, display.
transcript.cn: 它会详细讲解四个方面：首先是材料记录，然后是分类，接着是数据解读，也就是考古学家如何得出研究结论，最后是展示。

transcript.en: Tutor: Is that OK for you?
transcript.cn: 这些内容你能接受吗？

transcript.en: Russ: I think so.
transcript.cn: 我想可以。

transcript.en: Russ: Yes, thanks!
transcript.cn: 可以，谢谢！

transcript.en: Russ: Oh, one important thing, how is the module assessed?
transcript.cn: 哦，还有一件重要的事，这个模块如何考核？

transcript.en: Russ: Should we take an exam at the end of the semester?
transcript.cn: 我们要在学期末参加考试吗？

transcript.en: Tutor: No.
transcript.cn: 不用。

transcript.en: Tutor: It's all based on coursework after each lecture, so try your best when the lecturer assigns you a task.
transcript.cn: 考核全部依据每次讲座后的课程作业，所以老师布置任务时要尽力做好。

transcript.en: Russ: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Tutor: The second module's title is Towns and Cities.
transcript.cn: 第二个模块的名称是“城镇与城市”。

transcript.en: Tutor: It is taught by Professor Elliot, the head of our department.
transcript.cn: 这门课由我们系主任埃利奥特教授授课。

transcript.en: Tutor: And as the name suggests, the module focuses on the origins of built environments and how they developed.
transcript.cn: 顾名思义，这个模块重点研究人造环境的起源及其发展过程。

transcript.en: Russ: That's mainly factual, I suppose.
transcript.cn: 我想，这主要是事实性内容吧。

transcript.en: Tutor: It is.
transcript.cn: 是的。

transcript.en: Tutor: And for that reason, it is assessed by examination.
transcript.cn: 正因如此，这个模块采用考试的方式进行考核。

transcript.en: Tutor: But instead of a written exam, we set it as an oral one, as we think most students prefer this way.
transcript.cn: 不过，我们安排的是口试而不是笔试，因为我们认为大多数学生更喜欢这种方式。

transcript.en: Russ: It sounds a bit scary.
transcript.cn: 听起来有点吓人。

transcript.en: Russ: I prefer written exams.
transcript.cn: 我更喜欢笔试。

transcript.en: Tutor: Don't worry too much.
transcript.cn: 不用太担心。

transcript.en: Tutor: Most of our students find they enjoy it.
transcript.cn: 我们大多数学生都发现自己其实很享受口试。

transcript.en: Russ: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Tutor: And then the third module is called Method and Science.
transcript.cn: 第三个模块叫“方法与科学”。

transcript.en: Tutor: And in this module, Dr Thompson will introduce you to the standard techniques used in archaeological fieldwork and analysis, such as excavating and dating.
transcript.cn: 在这个模块中，汤普森博士会向你介绍考古田野工作和分析中使用的标准技术，例如发掘和年代测定。

transcript.en: Russ: What about the learning method for this module?
transcript.cn: 这个模块采用什么学习方式？

transcript.en: Russ: Are there any lectures, or it's all laboratory work?
transcript.cn: 有讲座吗，还是全部都是实验室工作？

transcript.en: Tutor: Oh, there aren't any lectures.
transcript.cn: 哦，没有讲座。

transcript.en: Tutor: It combines half lab work and half seminars.
transcript.cn: 它由一半实验室工作和一半研讨课组成。

transcript.en: Russ: What about the assessment?
transcript.cn: 考核方式呢？

transcript.en: Tutor: Oh, you are lucky; this module has no formal assessment.
transcript.cn: 哦，你很幸运，这个模块没有正式考核。

transcript.en: Tutor: But right at the end of the module, you will have to take part in a site survey.
transcript.cn: 不过，在模块即将结束时，你必须参加一次遗址调查。

transcript.en: Russ: That's great!
transcript.cn: 太好了！

transcript.en: Russ: Where shall we go for the site survey?
transcript.cn: 我们要去哪里进行遗址调查？

transcript.en: Tutor: Sorry, I can't tell you the location yet.
transcript.cn: 抱歉，我还不能告诉你地点。

transcript.en: Tutor: That would be announced later.
transcript.cn: 地点稍后会公布。

transcript.en: Tutor: The date for that is the week beginning the 10th of March.
transcript.cn: 调查安排在3月10日开始的那一周。

transcript.en: Russ: OK.
transcript.cn: 好的。

transcript.en: Russ: That's all I want to know.
transcript.cn: 我想了解的就是这些。

transcript.en: Russ: Thank you very much, Professor.
transcript.cn: 非常感谢您，教授。

transcript.en: Russ: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

transcript.en: Tutor: You are welcome, Russ.
transcript.cn: 不客气，拉斯。

transcript.en: Tutor: Bye!
transcript.cn: 再见！

groups.desc:
Questions 31-33
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: What impact does Marc Prensky believe digital technology has had on young people?

options.title: A
options.content: It has altered their thinking patterns.

options.title: B
options.content: It has harmed their physical development.

options.title: C
options.content: It has limited their brain capacity.

questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Marc Prensky、young people；提示词为 impact。
题目解析：本题作为开篇第一题，原文有一段背景介绍，考生耐心听会发现定位词 Marc Prensky 和 young people 原词重现，接着可听到 they have changed in fundamental ways，其中 changed 与 A 选项的 altered 为同义词，但目前只听到 A 选项的部分信息，还不能确定其是否为正确答案。随后原文提到“... processing information differently from the last generations.”，其中 processing information 对应 A 选项的 thinking patterns；differently from the last generations 也能对应 A 选项 altered 这个信息，因此 A 选项信息完整，为正确答案。原文后面提到“These young people's brains may have physically changed ...”，其中 brain 在 C 选项原词出现，physically 对应 B 选项的 physical 一词，但是这两个选项的其他信息（如 B 选项的 harmed、C 选项的 limited）在文中都未提及，信息不完整，为干扰选项。

questions.title: 'Digital immigrants' tend to access computers
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 digital immigrants；提示词为 access computers。
题目解析：定位词 digital immigrants 原词重现，原文先提到“When people learn a second language, they often retain their foreign accent.”，虽然对应 A 选项的 using their native language，但这并非 digital immigrants 的行为。作者是在打比方，其真正想表达的是随后的“They aren't quite as effective at speaking the digital language as the natives are.”，即 digital immigrants 使用电脑的效率不如 digital natives，其中 aren't quite as effective 对应 B 选项的 less efficiently；native 对应 young people，因此 B 选项信息完整，为正确答案。C 选项在文中未提及。该题需要理解作者举例的意图，难度还是比较大的。

questions.title: What example is given of having a 'digital accent'?
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 digital accent；提示词为 example。
题目解析：上一题结束后，根据提示词 example，定位到原文的 finding phone numbers with a phone book 和 looking up information in an encyclopaedia。这两个例子主要说明 digital immigrants 喜欢使用传统的方式获取信息，对应 B 选项 doing things the old-fashioned way。随后原文提到“Prensky refers to this as the digital accent.”，与题干定位词相呼应，可确定 B 选项为正确答案。此外，作者还总结道“... people with a digital accent always rely on their original non-digital means of sourcing information.”，其中 original non-digital means 对应 B 选项的 old-fashioned way，可再次确认答案。原文虽提到“... scanning a manual for a computer program ... the program itself will teach you how to use it.”，但与 C 选项 being unable to understand instructions（不能理解使用说明）不能完全对应。A 选项的 typing 一词原词重现，但原文说的是 rather than typing something into a computer，不能推出 A 选项 having less effective typing skills，因此，这两个选项皆为干扰选项。

groups.question_title: Which theorist makes each of the following points?
groups.desc:
Questions 34-40
Which theorist makes each of the following points?
Write the correct letter, A, B or C, next to Questions 34-40.

questions.title: Current teaching methods don't work.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 teaching methods；提示词为 current、don't work。
题目解析：对于人名观点类配对题，考生需要注意以下几点：1. 选项的人名不会被替换，题干信息会被替换，因此需要听取替换信息来定位每一题；2. 选项的人名虽然会原词出现，但其在原文中是先于题干替换信息出现的，因此在听到人名出现时，需要先记录下来（记下首字母即可）；3. 选项没有先后顺序，但答案位置的先后顺序与题号顺序基本一致，可帮助定位。如本题应对方法——稍许停顿后，原文先引出选项的三个人名，接着听到 Samuel James 单独出现，可先记下人名首字母 J。接着听到题干替换信息“... today's educators are no longer thriving in how they teach.”，其中 today 替换了题干信息 current；no longer thriving 替换了 don't work；how they teach 替换了 teaching methods，替换难度不大，题干信息都能对应上，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Many students don't understand computers.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 many students、computers；提示词为 don't understand。
题目解析：上一题结束后，可听到人名 Vander 单独出现，先记下其首字母 V。接着听到“... many of these students are not necessarily proficient with technology.”，其中 many of 替换了题干信息 many；technology 替换了 computers；not proficient 替换了 don't understand，题干信息都能对应上，因此 C 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Computer technology doesn't interest all students.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 computer technology；提示词为 doesn't interest。
题目解析：上一题结束后，可听到人名 Allen 单独出现，先记下其首字母 A。接着听到“... some don't find the digital medium appealing.”，其中 digital medium 替换了题干信息 computer technology；don't ... appealing 替换了 doesn't interest，题干信息都能对应上，因此 A 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Students can still learn the traditional way.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 traditional way。
题目解析：上一题结束后，可听到人名 James 单独出现，先记下其首字母 J。接着听到“... younger students can communicate with their digital immigrant teachers and still learn with the teaching methods that were quite effective in the past.”，其中 methods 和 in the past 对应题干信息 traditional way，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Students still need to learn research skills.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 research skills。
题目解析：上一题结束后，可听到人名 Allen 单独出现，先记下其首字母 A。虽然之后有较长的无关信息，但并未提及其他人的观点，耐心往下听便可听到答案句“... using computers at advanced levels, for example, to carry out complex information searches ...”，其中 advanced levels 和 complex information searches 替换了题干信息 research skills，因此 A 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: We should use computer games to teach.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 computer games；提示词为 teach。
题目解析：本题需排除先出现的人名 Allen，上一题结束后，原文提到“Unlike Allen's research ...”，注意 unlike 这个否定信息。接着听到人名 James 单独出现，先记下其首字母 J，随后听到“... computer games can play an important role in the classroom.”，对应题干信息，因此 B 选项为正确答案。

questions.title: Computers can't replace educators.
questions.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 computers、educators；提示词为 can't replace。
题目解析：上一题结束后，可听到人名 Vander 单独出现，先记下其首字母 V。接着听到“... no computer program comes close to doing what a human teacher does every day.”，其中 human teacher 对应题干 educators；no ... comes close to doing 对应 can't replace，因此 C 选项为正确答案。

transcript.en: In today's lecture, I'm going to talk about digital technology, especially the changes occurring due to the rapid spread of digital technology in the last decade of the 21st century.
transcript.cn: 今天的讲座中，我要谈谈数字技术，尤其是21世纪最后十年里，数字技术迅速普及所带来的变化。

transcript.en: First, what is digital technology?
transcript.cn: 首先，什么是数字技术？

transcript.en: Well, digital technology includes any computer related devices like mobile phones, the Internet, email, instant messaging, and so on.
transcript.cn: 数字技术包括任何与计算机相关的设备和技术，例如手机、互联网、电子邮件、即时通信等。

transcript.en: This lecture is based on the opinions of Marc Prensky and what he believes are the main effects that high exposure to digital technology has had on young people today.
transcript.cn: 本次讲座以马克·普伦斯基的观点为基础，讨论他所认为的高度接触数字技术给当今年轻人带来的主要影响。

transcript.en: Prensky believes that because today's young people have been born into a digital world and spent a long time simply playing with technology, they have changed in fundamental ways.
transcript.cn: 普伦斯基认为，当今的年轻人出生在数字世界中，又长期接触和使用技术，因此他们已经发生了根本性的变化。

transcript.en: He thinks they are evolving differently and, as a result, processing information differently from the last generations.
transcript.cn: 他认为，他们的进化方式有所不同，因此处理信息的方式也与前几代人不同。

transcript.en: These young people's brains may have physically changed, although no clear evidence exists.
transcript.cn: 这些年轻人的大脑甚至可能已经发生了生理变化，尽管目前还没有明确证据。

transcript.en: Prensky believes that we humans can be divided into digital natives and digital immigrants.
transcript.cn: 普伦斯基认为，人类可以分为数字原住民和数字移民。

transcript.en: Of course, today's young people belong to the group of digital natives because they were born into this new digital age and grew up just as native speakers of the digital language of computer technology.
transcript.cn: 当然，当今的年轻人属于数字原住民，因为他们出生于这个崭新的数字时代，在成长过程中就像以计算机技术的数字语言为母语的人一样。

transcript.en: However, digital immigrants are the people born in the generations before the digital age.
transcript.cn: 而数字移民则是出生于数字时代之前几代的人。

transcript.en: When people learn a second language, they often retain their foreign accent.
transcript.cn: 人们学习第二语言时，往往会保留自己的外国口音。

transcript.en: It is the same with digital immigrants.
transcript.cn: 数字移民也是如此。

transcript.en: They aren't quite as effective at speaking the digital language as the natives are.
transcript.cn: 他们使用数字语言时，不像数字原住民那样熟练自如。

transcript.en: Prensky illustrates this in detail.
transcript.cn: 普伦斯基对此进行了详细说明。

transcript.en: For example, instead of using the Internet as a primary source of information, digital immigrants prefer finding phone numbers with a phone book or looking up information in an encyclopaedia.
transcript.cn: 例如，数字移民不会把互联网作为主要信息来源，而更喜欢用电话簿查找电话号码，或从百科全书中查阅信息。

transcript.en: Prensky refers to this as the digital accent.
transcript.cn: 普伦斯基将这种现象称为“数字口音”。

transcript.en: Another example of the digital accent is scanning a manual for a computer program, but the program itself will teach you how to use it.
transcript.cn: 数字口音的另一个例子是翻看计算机程序的使用手册，尽管程序本身就会教你如何使用。

transcript.en: People with a digital accent always rely on their original non-digital means of sourcing information.
transcript.cn: 带有数字口音的人总是依赖原有的非数字方式来获取信息。

transcript.en: They prefer doing things as they've always done rather than typing something into a computer.
transcript.cn: 他们更喜欢沿用一贯的做法，而不是把内容输入计算机。

transcript.en: Due to this, Prensky predicts it will bring many changes, especially in education.
transcript.cn: 基于这一点，普伦斯基预测这将带来许多变化，尤其是在教育领域。

transcript.en: Other educators and theorists, such as Thompson Allen, Samuel James, and Peter Vander, also give their opinions.
transcript.cn: 汤普森·艾伦、塞缪尔·詹姆斯和彼得·范德等其他教育家和理论家也提出了自己的看法。

transcript.en: Samuel James is a famous educator from The University of Sydney.
transcript.cn: 塞缪尔·詹姆斯是悉尼大学的一位著名教育家。

transcript.en: He agrees with Prensky's idea that today's educators are no longer thriving in how they teach.
transcript.cn: 他赞同普伦斯基的观点，即当今教育者的教学方式已无法取得良好成效。

transcript.en: However, some more traditional theorists like Peter Vander and Thompson Allen don't agree.
transcript.cn: 不过，彼得·范德和汤普森·艾伦等较为传统的理论家并不认同。

transcript.en: They criticize many of Prensky's assertions.
transcript.cn: 他们批评了普伦斯基的许多论断。

transcript.en: Vander argues that a typical classroom is much more different from what Prensky believes, with students from various backgrounds.
transcript.cn: 范德认为，典型课堂与普伦斯基所设想的情况大不相同，学生有着各种不同的背景。

transcript.en: He believes that many of these students are not necessarily proficient with technology.
transcript.cn: 他认为，这些学生中有许多人未必熟练掌握技术。

transcript.en: Then, Allen adds his opinion that even though most students in modern times can access computers at home or school easily, some don't find the digital medium appealing.
transcript.cn: 接着，艾伦补充了自己的观点：尽管当今大多数学生都能在家中或学校轻松使用计算机，但有些人并不觉得数字媒介有吸引力。

transcript.en: However, James disagrees.
transcript.cn: 然而，詹姆斯并不同意。

transcript.en: He argues that all today's students share the same basic interesting knowledge of digital technology.
transcript.cn: 他认为，当今所有学生都对数字技术抱有同样的基本兴趣，并掌握相关知识。

transcript.en: However, even so, James believes that our younger students can communicate with their digital immigrant teachers and still learn with the teaching methods that were quite effective in the past.
transcript.cn: 不过即便如此，詹姆斯仍认为，年纪较小的学生能够与身为数字移民的老师交流，也仍然可以通过过去颇为有效的教学方法学习。

transcript.en: Allen believes that both digital natives and digital immigrants have to process a large amount of information in today's digital world.
transcript.cn: 艾伦认为，在当今的数字世界中，数字原住民和数字移民都必须处理大量信息。

transcript.en: He thinks that although most young students today are good at playing computer games or surfing the Internet, they use computers in important ways.
transcript.cn: 他认为，尽管如今大多数年轻学生擅长玩电脑游戏或上网，但他们确实会以重要的方式使用计算机。

transcript.en: They are not used to using computers at advanced levels, for example, to carry out complex information searches, which are essential for university study today.
transcript.cn: 他们并不习惯在高级层面使用计算机，例如开展复杂的信息检索，而这种能力对当今的大学学习至关重要。

transcript.en: Unlike Allen's research, James believes that computer games can play an important role in the classroom.
transcript.cn: 与艾伦的研究观点不同，詹姆斯认为电脑游戏可以在课堂中发挥重要作用。

transcript.en: For example, teachers can combine interesting computer games with the lessons to attract students' attention.
transcript.cn: 例如，教师可以将有趣的电脑游戏与课程结合起来，以吸引学生的注意力。

transcript.en: However, Vander has different opinions.
transcript.cn: 然而，范德持有不同看法。

transcript.en: He argues that teachers are always the leading part of the classroom, and no computer program comes close to doing what a human teacher does every day.
transcript.cn: 他认为，教师始终是课堂的主导者，任何计算机程序都远远无法媲美人类教师每天所做的工作。

transcript.en: As a result, we should think of better ways to assist teachers rather than focusing on developing games.
transcript.cn: 因此，我们应当思考如何更好地辅助教师，而不是专注于开发游戏。
